properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Directory path for storing uploaded files (videos, PDFs).

properties.name: app.security.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: app.security.cookie.secure
properties.description: Whether to mark auth cookies as Secure (HTTPS-only). Set to true in production.

properties.name: ai.enabled
properties.description: Master switch for AI features. Set to false to disable all AI calls.

properties.name: ai.gemini.api-key
properties.description: Google Gemini API key. Injected via GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable.

properties.name: ai.gemini.embedding-model
properties.description: Gemini model name used for embedding generation.

properties.name: ai.gemini.chat-model
properties.description: Gemini model name used for chat / tutoring responses.

properties.name: ai.gemini.max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum number of output tokens per LLM response.

properties.name: ai.gemini.temperature
properties.description: Sampling temperature for the LLM (0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = creative).

properties.name: ai.qdrant.host
properties.description: Hostname of the Qdrant vector-database instance.

properties.name: ai.qdrant.port
properties.description: gRPC port of the Qdrant instance.

properties.name: ai.qdrant.collection
properties.description: Name of the Qdrant collection used to store document vectors.

properties.name: ai.rag.chunk-size
properties.description: Maximum character length of each document chunk (~512 tokens).

properties.name: ai.rag.chunk-overlap
properties.description: Number of characters to overlap between consecutive chunks.

properties.name: ai.rag.top-k
properties.description: Number of top-scoring vector matches to retrieve per query.
